_comment: Documented compat deltas. Each entry suppresses a matching DiffRecord from the active section of summary.md and surfaces it under '## Suppressed (known deltas)' with its reason + regressionTest. See docs/registry/api-compat-deltas.md.

deltas.reason: v3's updateCache is phase-aware: 200 + Git-refresh duration while git-sourced components remain (migration-status git>0), 410 Gone once every component is migrated to the DB (git<=0). A db-mode compat candidate is fully migrated (auto-migrate -> git==0) so it returns 410 here; the git-mode candidate (no migration, git>0) returns 200 and matches baseline, so this delta does NOT appear in known-deltas-git.json (empty). baselineValue intentionally omitted: under parallel test load the V1 baseline can transport-fail this heavy operation (Git DSL re-clone) before the HTTP client's timeout — same root cause regardless of whether baseline answers 200 or transport-fails (0). id17 #3666 reproduced the transport-failure variant. Confirmed intentional 2026-05-15; updated for phase-aware 2026-06-01.
deltas.regressionTest: ComponentsRegistryServiceControllerUpdateCacheTest.git equal to zero retires the endpoint with 410 and does not re-read

deltas.reason: Symptom of the STATUS_CODE_DIFF entry above — when the V1 baseline transport-fails the heavy /updateCache call under parallel load, no response headers come back and only candidate (which answers 410 with a JSON ErrorResponse body) reports a content-type. Suppressed together with the status-code deprecation delta.
deltas.regressionTest: ComponentsRegistryServiceControllerUpdateCacheTest.git equal to zero retires the endpoint with 410 and does not re-read
